title: Pediatric Anemia CDSS Diagnostic Pattern
description: EP3-T4/FIX-C adds `sourcePassageId`, a REQUIRED key mirroring rule.schema.json's field of the same name and shape — candidate evidence must resolve to a passage-level record (or an explicit implementation-proposal sentinel), not merely to 'the cited source has some passage'. See rule.schema.json's `sourcePassageId` description for the full binding-rule cross-reference; the same pattern, nullability, and fail-safe-fallback semantics apply here.

sourcePassageId.description: REQUIRED key. Nullable (legitimate absence for a not-yet-backfilled candidate), though scripts/validate-kb.mjs rejects null for the shipped KB once the candidate backfill has run. Names exactly one passage record in modules/anemia/evidence.json#sources[].passages[], resolved against this candidate's first-cited source (evidence[0]). Bound to a source-supported passage only via an independently reviewed, human-attested mapping (see scripts/evidence/backfill-candidate-governance.mjs's REVIEWED_CANDIDATE_PASSAGE_MAP — the same fail-safe mechanism rule.schema.json's field uses); otherwise falls back to that source's `<SOURCE_ID>#implementation-proposal` sentinel.
